title: Mixed-Signal IC Verification Engineer (Complex IC Designs/Analog)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Create mixed-signal verification and coverage strategies tailored to complex IC designs, aligning with design architecture and specifications.
  • Construct verification testbenches using standard verification languages and methodologies, ensuring comprehensive coverage.
  • Author and execute test cases to validate mixed-signal circuits, focusing on functionality, performance, and reliability.
  • Analyze verification results meticulously, offering constructive feedback to design teams for improvements.
  • Collaborate closely with design and layout teams to pinpoint and resolve any design issues encountered during verification.
  • Innovate and refine verification methodologies, tools, and techniques to enhance scalability and portability.
  • Provide final sign-off on mixed-signal designs, ensuring readiness for tape-out.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in electrical & electronic or equivalents and with minimum 7 years of working experience.
  • Proficient in analog and mixed-signal circuit design and verification principles.
  • Capability to formulate test plans, deliver presentations on findings, and communicate effectively with cross-functional teams.
  • Familiarity with verification methodologies and tools including simulators, waveform viewers, automated execution, simulation time optimization, and coverage analysis.
  • Proficient in programming abilities, capable of crafting efficient scripts or programs in languages such as Perl, Python, and/or C.

__________________________________________________

HOW TO APPLY :

Interested candidates, please submit your resume by clicking on “Quick Apply” or contact win@hkmsvs.com for more details.

Please provide following information in the resume for immediate processing

1) Reasons for leaving current and/or last employment

2) Last drawn and/or current salary

3) Expected salary

4) Date of availability and/or Notice Period

All applications will be treated in strictest confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be notified

Wee Wai Dan

EA License No : 03C5391

EA Reg No : R22109628
